assertions.text: No let or const in JS block — ES5 only

assertions.evidence: Both withSuccessHandler and withFailureHandler present on each call

assertions.text: Checks actor.role === 'CEO' or 'ADMIN' before showing the panel
assertions.evidence: Uses perms.canManageStaff flag (does not exist in the real codebase) instead of actor.role check — would always be undefined/falsy and never show the panel
btn-danger btn-sm on Rebuild, btn-primary btn-sm on Refresh Dashboard

assertions.text: No http:// or https:// URL references (no external CDN)
Shows a spinner or loading indicator while the call is in flight
Renders server response in a status element after the call completes
